text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, if you're going to take a break, 
why don't you sit here next to me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You must be exhausted. Here, you can ——

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I suppose you can't really 
lie down here, can you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's a shame, I would've 
let you sleep on my lap…
